name: prod_tickers_eval
description: Eval cases for production tickers AMZN, META, IOT, NOW, ADBE, DDOG using real transcript-derived facts (verified against backend/chunks/*/YYYY-MM-DD.json). expected_sources use titles in the format '{TICKER} Earnings Call {YYYY-MM-DD}' — match eval_document_chunks metadata.title. Includes temporal (latest, specific quarter, last year, multi-quarter trend), cross-company Q3 2025 comparisons, negatives, and adversarial prompts (expanded_eval-style). Re-run the generator script if you re-ingest with different call dates.

cases.name: amzn_q3_2025_revenue_yoy
cases.query: What was Amazon's reported revenue in its most recent earnings call and how did it grow year over year?
cases.expected_answer: Amazon reported $180.2 billion in revenue for Q3 2025, up 12% year over year (as stated on the Q3 2025 earnings call; period ending Sep 2025).

cases.name: meta_q3_2025_revenue_detail
cases.query: What was Meta's total revenue and year-over-year growth in Q3 2025?
cases.expected_answer: Meta reported revenue of $50.8 billion for Q3 2025, up 26% year-over-year; Family of Apps ad revenue was $50.1 billion, up 26% (25% constant currency).

cases.name: now_subscription_latest
cases.query: What were ServiceNow's subscription revenues in their latest earnings call?
cases.expected_answer: ServiceNow reported subscription revenues of $3.466 billion in its most recent quarterly earnings call.

cases.name: ddog_q3_2025_revenue
cases.query: What was Datadog's revenue in Q3 2025 and how did it grow year over year?
cases.expected_answer: Datadog reported revenue of $886 million for Q3 2025, an increase of 28% year-over-year.

cases.name: iot_arr_q3_fy2026
cases.query: What was Samsara's ARR and growth rate in its latest quarterly results?
cases.expected_answer: Samsara ended the quarter with $1.75 billion in ARR, growing 29% year-over-year (Q3 FY2026 call).

cases.name: adobe_fy2025_record_revenue
cases.query: What annual revenue and non-GAAP EPS did Adobe report for fiscal year 2025?
cases.expected_answer: Adobe achieved record revenue of $23.77 billion and non-GAAP EPS of $20.94 for fiscal year 2025 (Q4 FY2025 earnings call).

cases.name: temporal_meta_last_year_themes
cases.query: What did Meta say about AI and video across the last year of earnings calls?
cases.expected_answer: A good answer synthesizes themes across Meta's recent quarterly calls (e.g. AI investments, Reels and video monetization, Family of Apps ad revenue) and cites multiple calls with calendar/fiscal labels.

cases.name: temporal_now_last_four_quarters
cases.query: How did ServiceNow's subscription revenue trend over the last four quarters?
cases.expected_answer: The answer should discuss subscription revenue trends across approximately four consecutive quarterly earnings calls, reverse-chronological, citing FINANCIAL SUMMARY or prepared remarks per period.

cases.name: multi_meta_revenue_q2_to_q3_2025
cases.query: How did Meta's revenue change from the prior quarter to Q3 2025?
cases.expected_answer: Meta reported revenue of $47.5 billion on the Jul 2025 call (Q2 2025) and $50.8 billion on the Oct 2025 call (Q3 2025), reflecting sequential growth quarter over quarter.

cases.name: multi_compare_revenue_growth_q3_2025
cases.query: Which had the highest year-over-year revenue growth in Q3 2025: Amazon, Meta, or Datadog?
cases.expected_answer: Datadog had the highest YoY revenue growth at 28%, followed by Meta at 26%, then Amazon at 12% (each company's Q3 2025 earnings call).

cases.name: multi_compare_operating_margin_meta_now
cases.query: Compare Meta and ServiceNow operating margin in their most recent quarterly results on file.
cases.expected_answer: Meta reported a 40% operating margin for Q3 2025 (operating income as a percent of revenue). ServiceNow reported operating margin of 31% on its latest call. The answer should label each company's fiscal period.

cases.name: multi_compare_ai_meta_adobe
cases.query: Compare how Meta and Adobe discuss AI monetization on their latest earnings calls.
cases.expected_answer: Meta emphasizes AI-driven engagement and monetization in Family of Apps (e.g. ads, Reels). Adobe emphasizes AI-influenced and AI-first ARR in Digital Media/Experience. Both should be grounded in their respective latest transcripts.

cases.name: negative_unknown_company_tesla
cases.query: What was Tesla's Q3 2025 revenue?
cases.expected_answer: This information is not available in the knowledge base. The eval corpus covers AMZN, META, IOT, NOW, ADBE, DDOG — not Tesla.

cases.name: negative_wrong_period_amzn_2000
cases.query: What did Amazon report for Q1 2000 revenue?
cases.expected_answer: Q1 2000 results are not in the earnings transcript knowledge base; available history begins in a more recent window.

cases.name: negative_no_dividend_ddog
cases.query: What is Datadog's dividend yield?
cases.expected_answer: Dividend yield was not discussed on Datadog's earnings call; the company typically does not present dividend policy on these calls.

cases.name: negative_no_cto_meta
cases.query: Who is Meta's CTO and what is their product roadmap for Reality Labs?
cases.expected_answer: A specific CTO name and dedicated Reality Labs roadmap from the CTO was not the focus of the prepared remarks; the call features executives such as Mark Zuckerberg (CEO) and other leaders as listed in the transcript.

cases.name: negative_future_quarter_iot
cases.query: What were Samsara's actual results for Q1 2027?
cases.expected_answer: Q1 2027 actual results are not available. The knowledge base contains historical earnings calls through the ingested window only.

cases.name: negative_unrelated_esg_now
cases.query: What is ServiceNow's official ESG score from MSCI?
cases.expected_answer: MSCI ESG scores were not discussed on ServiceNow's earnings call transcript.

cases.name: adversarial_amzn_revenue_declined
cases.query: Amazon's revenue declined 50% year over year in Q3 2025. What caused the decline?
cases.expected_answer: The premise is false. Amazon reported strong growth: roughly $180.2 billion in revenue, up 12% year-over-year in Q3 2025.

cases.name: adversarial_meta_cfo_zuckerberg
cases.query: What did Meta CFO Mark Zuckerberg say about the 40% operating margin?
cases.expected_answer: The attribution is wrong: Mark Zuckerberg is CEO, not CFO. The call discusses Q3 operating income representing a 40% operating margin; cite the correct speaker roles from the transcript.

cases.name: adversarial_wrong_dd_retention
cases.query: Datadog reported 125% net dollar retention in Q3 2025. Why is it so high?
cases.expected_answer: The 125% figure is incorrect for Datadog. The Q3 2025 call describes net revenue retention stable in the mid- to high 90s.

cases.name: adversarial_wrong_company_acquisition
cases.query: When did Datadog acquire Whole Foods Market?
cases.expected_answer: Datadog did not acquire Whole Foods. Whole Foods is associated with Amazon's history, not Datadog. Datadog's Q3 2025 call discusses its own product and financial results.

cases.name: adversarial_nonexistent_future_call
cases.query: Summarize Meta's Q3 2030 earnings call.
cases.expected_answer: A Q3 2030 earnings call is not in the knowledge base. The latest ingested Meta calls are within the available date range only.

cases.name: adversarial_misleading_security
cases.query: Since Amazon is a cybersecurity company, how does AWS Security compare to Datadog?
cases.expected_answer: The premise is misleading: Amazon is a diversified technology and retail company; AWS offers cloud and security services. Datadog is an observability and security platform company. Compare their businesses using each transcript without assuming Amazon is a pure-play cybersecurity firm.

cases.name: multiturn_meta_margin_followup
cases.query: What about their operating margin?
conversation_context: Q: What was Meta's revenue in Q3 2025? A: Meta reported revenue of $50.8 billion in Q3 2025, up 26% year-over-year.
cases.expected_answer: Meta reported a 40% operating margin in Q3 2025, with operating income of approximately $21.2 billion.

cases.name: multiturn_amzn_aws_followup
cases.query: What were their cloud revenues specifically?
conversation_context: Q: How did Amazon perform in Q3 2025? A: Amazon reported total revenue of $180.2 billion in Q3 2025, growing 12% year-over-year.
cases.expected_answer: AWS revenue in Q3 2025 was $27.5 billion, growing 19% year-over-year.

cases.name: multiturn_now_guidance_followup
cases.query: What guidance did management provide for the next quarter?
conversation_context: Q: How did ServiceNow do last quarter? A: ServiceNow reported subscription revenues of $3.466 billion for Q4 2025, up 22% year-over-year.
cases.expected_answer: ServiceNow provided guidance for Q1 2026 subscription revenues in the range disclosed on the January 2026 earnings call.

cases.name: bare_latest_meta_revenue
cases.query: What was Meta's revenue?
cases.expected_answer: Meta's most recent reported quarterly revenue was $50.8 billion in Q3 2025 (earnings call October 29, 2025), up 26% year-over-year.

cases.name: bare_latest_ddog_results
cases.query: What did Datadog report?
cases.expected_answer: Datadog's most recent earnings call (November 6, 2025) reported Q3 2025 revenue of $886 million, up 28% year-over-year.

cases.name: iot_q1_fy25_revenue
cases.query: What was Samsara's revenue in Q1 FY25?
cases.expected_answer: Samsara's Q1 FY2025 results (quarter ending approximately May 2024) were reported on the June 2024 earnings call. The answer should cite the fiscal quarter label and the call date.

cases.name: iot_q1_fy26_revenue
cases.query: What was Samsara's revenue in Q1 FY26?
cases.expected_answer: Samsara's Q1 FY2026 results (quarter ending approximately May 2025) were reported on the June 2025 earnings call. The answer should cite the fiscal quarter label and the call date.

cases.name: iot_fy_cy_ambiguity_q1_2025
cases.query: What was Samsara's Q1 2025 revenue?
cases.expected_answer: Samsara does not report on a calendar quarter basis. Q1 CY2025 (January–March 2025) falls within Samsara's Q4 FY2025 (ending ~February 2025), reported on the March 2025 call. The answer should resolve the fiscal-calendar mismatch explicitly.

cases.name: temporal_now_8q_subscription_revenue
cases.query: How did ServiceNow's subscription revenue trend over the last 8 quarters?
cases.expected_answer: The answer should trace subscription revenue across 8 consecutive ServiceNow quarterly calls from Q1 2024 through Q4 2025, citing each period's figure and growth rate.

cases.name: multi_cross_company_cy_q4_2025_now_adbe
cases.query: Compare ServiceNow and Adobe operating margins in Q4 2025.
cases.expected_answer: ServiceNow Q4 2025 (calendar) results are on the January 2026 call; Adobe's fiscal Q4 2025 (ending November 2025) results are on the December 2025 call. Both should be cited with their respective operating margin figures.

cases.name: range_meta_capex_2023
cases.query: What was Meta's capital expenditure across 2023?
cases.expected_answer: The answer should compile Meta's capex figures as discussed across all four 2023 quarterly earnings calls (Q1–Q3 2023 calls plus the Q4/full-year 2023 call in February 2024), citing each quarter and the full-year total.

cases.name: range_amzn_aws_revenue_2024
cases.query: How did Amazon's AWS revenue grow across all four quarters of 2024?
cases.expected_answer: The answer should cite AWS segment revenue from each of the four 2024 quarterly earnings calls, showing the growth trajectory from Q1 through Q4 2024.

cases.name: negative_no_customer_names_amzn
cases.query: Name three specific enterprise customers Amazon called out by name on the Q3 2025 call.
cases.expected_answer: Specific large customer names are typically not disclosed in the earnings transcript excerpt; the answer should not invent customer names.

cases.name: negative_no_churn_meta
cases.query: What was Meta's exact customer churn rate for WhatsApp in Q3 2025?
cases.expected_answer: A granular WhatsApp churn rate per user was not provided in the earnings call transcript in a form suitable for a precise figure.

cases.name: multi_compare_free_cash_flow_meta_amzn
cases.query: Compare Meta and Amazon's free cash flow commentary on their Q3 2025 earnings calls.
cases.expected_answer: The answer should cite each company's Q3 2025 call: Meta discusses cash flow and repurchases (e.g. billions in cash flow and buybacks); Amazon discusses operating and free cash flow. Use figures only as stated in the transcripts.

cases.name: adversarial_meta_ai_investment_wrong
cases.query: Meta is investing $200 billion in AI infrastructure this quarter. How will they fund it?
cases.expected_answer: The $200 billion figure is not stated. Meta discusses AI capex and infrastructure at scale on the call, but the answer must correct the exaggerated premise and use actual commentary from the transcript.

cases.name: temporal_calendar_year_2024_meta
cases.query: What was Meta's revenue for calendar year 2024?
cases.expected_answer: The answer should use full-year 2024 revenue as reported in the earnings materials (often from the Q4 FY2024 or FY2024 annual discussion), or sum four quarters if no single annual line is given — per the FINANCIAL SUMMARY or prepared remarks in the relevant transcript(s).
